name: Mobix Labs Inc. Class A Common Stock
summary: Mobix Labs Inc. is a global connectivity solutions provider for wireless and wired high-performance connectivity solutions, which delivers advanced technology to simplify, and accelerate the delivery of next generation products such as 5G, mobile, infrastructure, data center and automotive connectivity solutions. The company's headquarters is in Irvine, California. They operate with a fabless business model, partnering with leading semiconductor manufacturers to produce their chips.
